content: FastAPI Supabase JWT: Supabase uses HS256 (HMAC256), NOT RS256. JWT secret is in Supabase project settings (not anon key). Must verify audience claim 'aud':'authenticated' - forgetting allows any Supabase token. Use dependency injection (Depends) to create get_current_user() that decodes and validates JWT on every protected endpoint. python-jose or PyJWT both work. Preferred: verify against JWKS endpoint for future-proofing. Security risk: if JWT secret leaks anyone can forge tokens.
